key_evidence: OpenAI signatory to Pentagon 8 classified AI contracts (May 1) — Anthropic excluded for declining same terms
Altman previously verbally agreed with Anthropic's bright-lines on autonomous weapons / mass surveillance
Contract acceptance implies acceptance of terms Anthropic refused — INT/values gap
Musk-Altman litigation hold lifted May 19 (no immediate composite impact)
rationale: Δ -1.7 is below 5pt change threshold. Comparative-governance signal is structurally meaningful but contract terms not yet operationalized into a documented use event. Threshold-crossing downgrade warranted if specific OpenAI deployment under Pentagon contract involves autonomous-weapons or mass-surveillance functionality.
